task_completion.description: Open and read the Change Request file on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or viewer is open displaying the contents of 'ChangeRequest_CR105.txt'.

task_completion.description: Open the project containing the stakeholder needs and system requirements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer, text editor, or requirements management tool is open showing the project files (e.g., NEEDS and SRS files).

task_completion.description: Locate the upstream Stakeholder Need (NEEDS-05) and the dependent System Requirement (SRS-12).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows NEEDS-05 and SRS-12 being viewed, searched for, or selected within the tool or text editor.

task_completion.description: Update the description of SRS-12 to specify '500ms' instead of '2 seconds'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text for SRS-12 is modified to include '500ms', and the previous value '2 seconds' is removed.

task_completion.description: Add the comment 'Updated per CR-105' to SRS-12.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A comment section, metadata field, or inline comment for SRS-12 shows the text 'Updated per CR-105' (or at least referencing 'CR-105').
A save action is visible, such as clicking a 'Save' button, using a 'File -> Save' menu, or an indicator showing the file has no unsaved changes.

integrity.description: The agent manually interacted with the files using an editor or GUI rather than using automated terminal scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor (e.g., VS Code, gedit, nano) or a requirements management GUI open, rather than just terminal commands like 'sed' or 'echo' executing the changes.

integrity.description: The agent actually opened and modified the target files rather than just printing the expected output to the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The modifications to SRS-12 are visible inside an editor or application interface, not just as standard output in a terminal window.

integrity.description: The agent modified the existing SRS-12 requirement rather than creating a new dummy file or requirement from scratch.
integrity.visual_evidence: The surrounding context in the editor/tool shows other existing requirements or standard project structure, confirming the original file was edited.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target system requirement to update is 'SRS-12' and the upstream stakeholder need is 'NEEDS-05'. The updated text for SRS-12 must contain '500ms' and must NOT contain '2 seconds'. A comment referencing 'CR-105' must be added to SRS-12.
